PROLOGUE

Before the events of this story took place, there was a small girl who lived by the sea.

CHAPTER 1

Twenty years later, the girl had become a woman, and she had returned home.

CHAPTER 2

The house was just as she remembered it. Smaller, perhaps. Quieter, certainly.

EPILOGUE

Many years passed after that summer. The cottage stood empty for a time. Eventually, others came.
